message:
feat: Add metal0 SIMD JSON + fix KV cache contamination bug

Performance improvements:
- Add metal0 as submodule with SIMD-accelerated JSON (2.7-3.1x faster parsing)
- Fix critical KV cache contamination bug in scheduler

Bug fix details:
- When requests completed, prefix cache entries still pointed to cells
  containing generated tokens (including EOG), causing subsequent requests
  with the same prefix to copy contaminated KV cache
- Fix: clearCellKVCache() now invalidates all prefix cache entries for the cell
- Result: Consistent 7-8 tokens vs previous 256 tokens (garbage output)

Benchmark results (qwen2.5:0.5b):
- Ollama: ~0.82s avg (0.40-1.23s range)
- Zell:   ~0.18s avg (0.14-0.27s range)
- Zell is ~4.5x faster with more consistent response times

files.patch:
@@ -4,3 +4,6 @@
 [submodule "vendor/ghostty"]
 	path = vendor/ghostty
 	url = https://github.com/ghostty-org/ghostty.git
+[submodule "vendor/metal0"]
+	path = vendor/metal0
+	url = ../metal0
